summary: Created lib/deploy.sh with deploy_run_agent, deploy_persist, and deploy_gate functions. deploy_gate runs the deployment agent with tests/ADR context, persists deploy.json, creates a git commit on pass (silently skipping if not a git repo), logs failures and returns 1 on fail. Updated Agents/deployment.md with the full contract (decision, gates_checked, failures, notes outputs; constraints enforcing tests and typecheck gates). All 43 deploy.bats tests pass with no regressions (326 total).
